narrative:
Jackson 11 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,021 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
